audience: English-speaking owners and marketing teams at Belgian SMEs preparing content for search engines and generative answer systems
primaryDutchSearchIntent: KMO's uitleggen hoe SEO, AEO en GEO samen zorgen voor duidelijke, vindbare en bronwaardige websitecontent

searchIntent.question: How can an SME improve its chances of appearing in Google, ChatGPT and other AI search results?
searchIntent.geographicContext: Belgian SMEs, with examples grounded in Limburg, Belgium

directAnswer: SMEs improve their chances of appearing in AI search results by publishing crawlable, well-structured and factually consistent content that answers real questions, identifies the business clearly and supports claims with evidence. GEO and AEO build on sound SEO; no setting or schema can guarantee a citation.
title: GEO and AEO for SMEs: visibility in Google, ChatGPT and AI search
metaDescription: Want to appear in AI search results? Learn how SEO, AEO and GEO combine clear content, sound technology, reliable sources and meaningful measurement.
h1: GEO and AEO for SMEs: appearing in Google, ChatGPT and AI search results

internalLinks.anchor: discuss your SEO and GEO priorities

factsToPreserve: Google treats GEO and AEO for its generative search features as part of SEO
There is no special AI schema, mandatory llms.txt file or ideal AI page length
Crawler access is necessary but never guarantees a position, citation, click or lead
OAI-SearchBot and GPTBot serve different purposes
All dated July 2026 platform reporting statements and limitations remain qualified
